zh.lifeSummary: Walter de Insula是Geoffrey de Insula和Hawise的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特伍頓。他於大約1239年與Matilda de Estur在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特伍頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1263年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter de Insula是Geoffrey de Insula和Hawise的儿子，出生在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特伍頓。他于大约1239年与Matilda de Estur在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特伍頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1263年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Walter de Insula was born in Wootton, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Geoffrey de Insula and Hawise. He married Matilda de Estur about 1239, in Wootton, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1263.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Insulaはイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトウットオンでGeoffrey de InsulaとHawiseの息子として生まれた。約1239年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトウットオンでMatilda de Esturと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年に死去した。

ko.of Gatcombe, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 보턴

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Insula(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 보턴에서 Geoffrey de Insula(와)과 Hawise의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 보턴에서 Matilda de Estur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Matilda de Estur aproximadamente 1239, em Wootton, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1263.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter de Insula родился в местности вуттон, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Geoffrey de Insula и Hawise. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Estur около 1239 г. в местности вуттон, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1263 г.
